basics.name: Anna Tishchenko, PMP
basics.label: Project Manager
basics.summary: Results-oriented Project Manager with PMP® certification from PMI, specialising in IT. Proven track record of delivering complex cross-functional projects on time and within budget across client-facing and internal initiatives. Known for leading diverse teams, optimising delivery processes, and maintaining high client satisfaction through structured planning, stakeholder alignment, and consistent execution.

work.name: Vertex
work.summary: Scope: Lead delivery and roadmap planning for one of Vertex’s fintech products, coordinating product, engineering, business, support, and integration streams across releases, operational processes, and growth.
highlights: Own roadmap planning across sprint, quarterly, and annual horizons, aligning business priorities, release scope, and execution across product and technical teams.
Manage and prioritise multiple backlogs spanning provider integrations, client-facing features, and core product initiatives to support release delivery and operational scaling.
Coordinate complex provider-side and client-side integrations, acting as a key cross-functional point of contact across clients, support, business, and engineering teams.
Formalise core operating processes for integrations, support, and card-provider workflows; drive the creation of external API documentation and Jira workflow automation.
Collect and track business, financial, and system health metrics; prepare investor-facing reports and support product visibility in quarterly company reviews and all-hands.
Contribute to PMO and cross-company process standardisation; support headcount and infrastructure planning by consolidating staffing and cost inputs for approval.

work.name: SOFTSWISS
work.summary: Scope: Managed client-facing B2B/B2C projects for a digital platform, translating client requirements into scoped solutions, delivery plans, and launch-ready configurations.
highlights: Delivered 3–8 month B2B/B2C implementation projects across Agile, hybrid, and Waterfall models, consistently on time and within budget.
Maintained 95% client satisfaction by aligning client requirements, delivery constraints, and cross-functional execution.
Independently customised and tested client website configurations, shortening the path from approved requirements to launch-ready implementations.
Reduced delivery disruptions by 30% through proactive risk management, dependency tracking, and stakeholder communication.

work.name: ANRO IT
work.summary: Scope: Led delivery across multiple IT initiatives, balancing client communication, resource allocation, reporting, onboarding, and process improvement in a multi-project environment.
highlights: Coordinated up to 10 concurrent IT initiatives at different stages and levels of intensity, maintaining on-time delivery and 90% customer satisfaction.
Designed and embedded project delivery processes that improved estimation accuracy by 25% and reduced delivery time by 20%.
Built a high-level pre-contract project estimation framework, enabling more accurate timeline forecasting before deal sign-off.
Managed resource allocation and delivery trade-offs across parallel projects, reducing conflicts and improving execution consistency.

work.name: Contented
work.summary: Scope: Led research and launch preparation for a new educational product in interior design, shaping target audience insights, product positioning, and go-to-market inputs.
highlights: Conducted market and competitor research, user surveys, and interviews with potential customers to validate demand and identify untapped opportunities.
Defined the target audience based on working hypotheses and synthesised research findings into insights and recommendations for product positioning and marketing strategy.
Supported the launch of a new educational product that generated $10,000+ in revenue within its first month.

work.name: Printum
work.summary: Scope: Managed product delivery for a B2B product, owning backlog prioritisation, sprint and release planning, and cross-functional execution from ideation through launch.
highlights: Led a cross-functional team of DevOps, analysts, and developers to maintain a new B2B product.
Owned both the product backlog and implementation project backlogs, prioritising work and planning team capacity across sprints and releases.
Managed the feature delivery lifecycle from ideation to launch, aligning business needs, implementation scope, and execution across teams.
Improved product documentation and document workflows, reducing customer-side errors and increasing developer engagement.

work.name: SMART WORLD
work.summary: Scope: Managed software delivery projects, supported team growth, and maintained client communication across ongoing engagements.
highlights: Coordinated multiple software projects, keeping delivery on track against timelines, budgets, and stakeholder expectations.
Supported hiring and onboarding of developers, helping strengthen team capacity and day-to-day execution.
Improved project delivery processes and maintained strong client relationships, contributing to repeat business.

education.institution: Royal Melbourne Institute of Technology (RMIT University)
Tomsk State University of Control Systems and Radioelectronics
Project Manager Professional, PMP Exam Preparation Course
